task_description:
You are a reviewer validating conflict workflows. A repository has been set up at `/home/user/divergence-repo`. The repository has a bookmark `feature-branch` that has diverged due to concurrent modifications on different machines. One side of the divergence added a file `feature.txt` with the text 'Machine A changes', and the other side added the same file `feature.txt` with the text 'Machine B changes'.

Your task is to resolve this divergence. You must use `jj` commands to inspect the divergence. Then, you need to resolve the conflict such that `feature.txt` contains exactly the text 'Resolved changes' and the divergence is resolved (i.e., `feature-branch` points to a single non-conflicted commit).
truth: The repository at `/home/user/divergence-repo` must have a bookmark `feature-branch` pointing to a single commit. The file `feature.txt` in that commit must contain exactly 'Resolved changes'. There should be no conflicts in the working copy or the commit pointed to by `feature-branch`.
